title: copier.unwrapError(): update for Go 1.16
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind cleanup

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Since we started calling into the standard library's `io/fs` package directly, we effectively made Go 1.16 our minimum Go version, so we don't need to keep the workaround for compiling with Go 1.12.

~Unexport the local Lgetxattrs/Lsetxattrs, which we're not using anywhere else.~

#### How to verify it

The unit tests should now exercise the function's use in handling ERANGE errors from the kernel.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Oh, so _that's_ why those were exported.
LGTM just one nit above regarding splitting the commit.
